title: Chat Highlight & Sound
description: Highlights your name or custom words from chat messages and plays sounds
body:
This mod highlights your name or custom words from chat messages and plays sounds.

You can configure custom keywords to be highlighted, choose the highlight color, and select one of the sounds in the config screen.

On fabric (mod ver >1.0.2) the cofnig screen can be opened by pressing 'U'.
On forge, it is accessible via Mods menu.

![config screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZxVa4ICg/images/8cf117fc7ea3744ed090be85b13f9313202720f9.png)
